description.short: Your self-hosted Ghostfolio portfolio, made AI-native — one-click install, silent auth, then Irisy reads holdings and records trades through the :17873 gate.
description.long: A CTRL feature pack for Ghostfolio (open-source, self-hosted finance). One-click + silent by declaration: CTRL's generic provision engine brings up Ghostfolio's Docker stack (app + PostgreSQL + Redis) with freshly generated secrets, then the auth engine mints an account automatically (bootstrap) and exchanges the security token for a JWT per call (token-exchange) — no manual URL/token entry. Beyond the raw REST, the manifest's record_source declaration lifts the portfolio into the uniform §14 describe/query/produce contract, reached through the generic connector tools (source_describe / source_query / source_produce with source_id=ctrl-ghostfolio), governed + audited at :17873, credentials kernel-side and never shown to the model.

service.compose_inline:
services:
  ghostfolio:
    image: ghostfolio/ghostfolio:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://ghostfolio:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres:5432/ghostfolio?connect_timeout=300&sslmode=prefer
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_PORT: 6379
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
      ACCESS_TOKEN_SALT: ${ACCESS_TOKEN_SALT}
      JWT_SECRET_KEY: ${JWT_SECRET_KEY}
    ports:
      - "${PORT_APP}:3333"
  postgres:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ghostfolio
      POSTGRES_USER: ghostfolio
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ghostfolio"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 20
    volumes:
      - ghostfolio-postgres:/var/lib/postgresql/data
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: ["redis-server", "--requirepass", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}"]
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}", "ping"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 20
volumes:
  ghostfolio-postgres:

fields.label: Ghostfolio instance URL
fields.description: Connect an existing Ghostfolio you already run (cloud or self-hosted), e.g. https://ghostfolio.example.com — use this instead of one-click Set up if you don't want the Docker stack.

fields.label: Security token
fields.description: Your Ghostfolio security token (Account settings). Stored in your OS keychain, never sent to the model.

steps.command: echo 'Ask Irisy for your holdings — routed through the :17873 gate via source_query (source_id=ctrl-ghostfolio).'
